firmware.title: Commodore 64
firmware.author: Mikhail Matveev, DnCraptor
firmware.description: Commodore 64 PAL emulator running on RP2350. The C64, released in 1982, is the best-selling single personal computer model of all time with over 17 million units sold. It defined an era of 8-bit home computing with its legendary SID sound chip and colorful VIC-II graphics. Famous for classics like Impossible Mission, Maniac Mansion, and The Last Ninja. Features full SID sound emulation and VICE-style keyboard mapping. Loads D64 and D81 disk images from SD card. Based on Frodo by Christian Bauer.
firmware.controls: PS/2 or USB keyboard (VICE layout). NES/SNES gamepad as joystick. F9: swap port, F10: disk UI, F11: RESTORE.
